name: mutagen
description: Agentic design workflow: April elicits the five upstream design documents, Shredder slices them into a dependency-ordered queue, and Karai dispatches Bebop / Baxter / Chaplin / Metalhead / Splinter / Tatsu / Krang through Bishop review and Tiger Claw adversarial QA, with Traag-style scope enforcement via PreToolUse hook.
